name: Quebec Mortis
short_description: Top down retro adventure game including 4 different stories.
detailed_description:
Quebec Mortis

A retro adventure featuring four distinct stories.

Each story brings a different theme, gameplay style, and a uniquely Québec-inspired setting.

Episode 1 - Horror

Louis calls his brother but he doesn't answer. He leaves a message "please don't do anything stupid!". Louis quickly heads out to his brother's home but he is missing... He decides to stay there for the night and go look for his brother the next day. This is when you come into play.

Episode 2 - Western

Serge finds himself involuntarily in the midst of a dispute at the heart of the Western festival. Someone put Serge up to this and was able to convince him. But how? All he wanted was to buy a simple hat!

Episode 3 - Sci-Fi

Kas is woken up after hearing some strange noise. Is it her mother calling for help ? Kas walks through the spaceship that seems corrupted by some kind of evil entity.

Épisode 4 - Fantaisie

This year, David convinces Erika to join him at Bicolline, without realizing it will lead him to face his greatest fear.

Features

  • 4 unique stories with memorable characters

  • Québec-inspired environments

  • 4 gameplay styles: Survival-Horror, Puzzle, Metroidvania, RPG

  • Humorous and psychological tone

  • Each episode designed to be completed in a single evening — short, focused, and fun
